case_title: BENJAMIN C HEADRICK VS. GEORGE KALLIGEROS et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,255.00 FILED BY HEADRICK, BENJAMIN C AS TO DEFENDANT KALLIGEROS, GEORGE KALLIGEROS, ELENI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS WERE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
